race.comment: Pike finds himself another good booking in SASSY SNIPPET (13) who's heading the right way and is expected to prove tough to beat third-up after just missing at Pinjarra. Hitting her straps now and should be getting the job done. LADY MONEY TALK (14) returned last time with a solid second at Albany over 1240m. Bit tougher this time but she's got upside and should appreciate the rise in trip. LEG GODT (16) finished a close sixth last start over 1200m at Pinjarra, an improvement on her debut effort at Ascot the run prior. Is open to further improvement and keeps C Parnham piloting. Have to respect. TASMAN JEWEL (10) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when third over the mile at Albany. Drops back in trip but draws well again.
